items.title: Live smoke command exists and can classify provider failures
items.description: The repository provides a dedicated Tushare live smoke command and emits structured categories for external provider failures.

items.title: Real token can pass the first live provider gate
items.description: A real Tushare token can successfully call the first required canonical dataset and produce a successful live smoke summary.

items.title: Live sync can write an isolated real-data snapshot
items.description: A real Tushare-backed market_data sync can run against an isolated runtime directory and materialize a BUILDING snapshot without polluting the default dev database.

items.title: VIP financial datasets are reachable in live mode with symbol-level fallback
items.description: The current real token can access fina_indicator_vip/income_vip/balancesheet_vip/cashflow_vip, and the provider can fall back per symbol to the nearest available report period so live sync materializes covered fundamental_feature_daily rows.
